english: Somnatha in Saurashtra and Mallikarjuna in Shrishailam
roman: Saurastre Soma natham cha Shri Shaile Mallika arjunam

english: Mahakal in Ujjain and Omkareshwara and Amleshwara
Vaidyanatha in Parali and Bhimashankara in Dakini
roman: Paralyam Vaidya natham cha Dakinyam Bhima shankaram

english: Rameshwara at Setubandha and Nageshwara in Darukavana
roman: Setu bandhe cha Ramesham Nagesham Darukavane

english: Vishweshwara in Varanasi and Tryambaka on the banks of the Godavari
roman: Varanasya am cha Vishvesham Tryambakam Gautami tate

hindi: हिमालये तु केदारं घृष्णेशं च शिवालये॥
english: Kedara in the Himalayas and Ghrishneshwara at Shivalaya
roman: Himalaye tu Kedaram Ghrishnesh am cha Shivalaye

english: Whoever reads these twelve Jyotirlingas in the evening and morning
roman: Etani Jyotirlinga ni sayam pratah pathen narah

english: The sins of seven births are destroyed by remembering them
roman: Sapta janma kritam papam smaranena vinashyati
